title: HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT - 211info
text: DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential case management to individuals living with HIV and AIDS. This program provides expense assistance for HIV medications, transportation costs to medical care appointments, insurance premium payments, transitional housing and rent payment assistance, dental care, disease management education, referrals to other agencies for basic needs, employment, and substance abuse treatment. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Monday-Friday 8:00am-5pm Email (541) 322-7155 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 322-7155 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an intake appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Case/Care Management * AIDS/HIV Issues Dental Care Referrals * AIDS/HIV Health Insurance Premium Assistance * AIDS/HIV Medical Care Expense Assistance * AIDS/HIV Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * AIDS/HIV Prescription Expense Assistance * AIDS/HIV Rent Payment Assistance * AIDS/HIV Safe Sex Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE AND PERINATAL CARE COORDINATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CONNECTS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
